name: @vanillagreen/pi-output-policy
description: OMP-style large-output policy for Pi tool results: minimization, bounded truncation, and spill-file preservation.

settings.label: Enable output policy
settings.description: Apply minimization, spill, truncation, and UI safety caps to tool results.

settings.label: Policy mode
settings.description: Budget profile for inline truncation. balanced (default) caps non-read/non-mutation tool results at ~24 KB inline so long sessions stay under provider request buffers. compact halves those caps for very long runs. compat restores pre-1.1 UI-safety-only defaults (200 KB inline) when you need full output and aren't worried about transcript size. Explicit per-knob values override the mode default.

settings.label: Truncate file reads
settings.description: Apply output-policy spill/truncation to read tool file contents. Disabled by default so file reads are returned unmodified.

settings.label: Truncate edits/writes
settings.description: Apply output-policy spill/truncation and detail sanitization to edit/write tool results. Disabled by default so Pi's standard edit diffs are preserved unmodified.

settings.label: Output spill threshold (KB)
settings.description: Preserve full output externally when text exceeds this size. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced 48, compact 16, compat 200.

settings.label: Inline tail size (KB)
settings.description: Bytes retained inline for tail-truncated command/log output after spill. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced 16, compact 6, compat 100.

settings.label: Inline tail lines
settings.description: Lines retained inline for tail-truncated command/log output after spill. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced 400, compact 200, compat 2000.

settings.label: Max UI-safe text block (KB)
settings.description: Hard cap for text blocks even when spill is disabled or fails. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced 24, compact 8, compat 200.

settings.label: Max UI-safe line count
settings.description: Hard line cap for rendered/result text. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced 400, compact 200, compat 8000.

settings.label: Max UI-safe line width
settings.description: Truncate individual pathological lines to this character width. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced 3000, compact 2000, compat 20000.

settings.label: Preserve full output externally
settings.description: Write oversized full output to an extension-managed artifact file when possible.

settings.label: Sanitize details payloads
settings.description: Cap nested tool-result details. When unset, policyMode picks: balanced/compact on, compat off. State-bearing tools listed in 'Sanitize details allowlist' bypass this and pass through untouched.

settings.label: Sanitize details allowlist
settings.description: Comma-separated tool names whose details bypass sanitization (their inline details point at sidecars/state files that must not be capped). Empty means the built-in list: tasks_write, tasks_read, bg_task, bg_status, subagent, subagent_run, stop_subagent, steer_subagent, get_subagent_result.

settings.label: Reduce verbose shell output
settings.description: Compress repetitive git/npm/cargo/test output before truncation. Keeps first/last lines plus warnings, errors, and test summaries so successful validation does not waste context.

settings.label: Shell minimizer allowlist
settings.description: Comma-separated command families to minimize. Empty means built-in defaults.

settings.label: Shell minimizer denylist
settings.description: Comma-separated command families that should never be minimized.

settings.label: Shell minimizer max capture bytes
settings.description: Do not run minimizer on shell output larger than this byte count; truncate directly instead.

author: vanillagreen
